display.purpose: Animated numeric values in StatCard components. Tabular-nums. Numbers that must land with authority.

headline.purpose: The product logotype ('SCIENCEFIT') in the sidebar only. Not a general heading style.

title.purpose: Page section headings, modal titles, card group labels.

body.purpose: Table cell content, body copy, form labels. Base size 14px for data-dense layouts.

label.purpose: Table column headers, badge text. Uppercase tracked caps reserved for structural labeling only.

shadows.name: ambient-low
shadows.purpose: Default resting state for cards and containers. Separation without assertion.

shadows.name: ambient-high
shadows.purpose: Modal and elevated panel surfaces only.

shadows.name: primary-glow-rest
shadows.purpose: Primary button at rest. The only colored shadow in the system.

shadows.name: primary-glow-hover
shadows.purpose: Primary button on hover — expands to signal intent.

shadows.name: nav-active-glow
shadows.purpose: Active sidebar navigation item. Confirms selection, not decoration.

motion.name: easing-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for all state transitions — buttons, nav items, modals, page containers.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Micro-interactions: button hover, input focus ring, table row hover.

motion.name: duration-normal
motion.purpose: Modal overlay, sidebar slide, nav item hover slide.

motion.name: duration-page
motion.purpose: Page container fadeInUp, staggered content entrances (0.1s–0.4s delays).

motion.name: anim-fade-in-up
motion.purpose: Page container and card entrance. Stagger via animation-delay (0.1s increments).

breakpoints.name: mobile
breakpoints.purpose: Stat card row stacks to column.

breakpoints.name: charts
breakpoints.purpose: Charts grid collapses to single column.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action trigger. Red gradient fill with glow shadow. Used for create, save, confirm actions.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-primary"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19"/><line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"/></svg> Nueva Acción</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 8px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.01em; color: #fff; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #C62828, #8B0000); box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(198,40,40,0.25); border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(198,40,40,0.35); filter: brightness(1.05); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action. Transparent at rest, cream on hover. Used for cancel, secondary CTAs.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 8px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.01em; color: #6B6B6B; background: transparent; border: 1px solid #E8E4E0; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #FAFAF8; color: #1a1a1a; } .ds-btn-ghost:active { transform: scale(0.98); }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Semantic status indicator. Pill shape, uppercase label. Used in tables and cards to show subscription plan or user state.
components.html: ActivoBloqueadoPendienteMAXFREE
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 20px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.03em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-badge-active { background: #E8F5E9; color: #2E7D32; } .ds-badge-blocked { background: #FFEBEE; color: #C62828; } .ds-badge-pending { background: #FFF8E1; color: #F57F17; } .ds-badge-max { background: #FFEBEE; color: #C62828; } .ds-badge-free { background: #F3F4F6; color: #555555; }

components.name: Stat Card
components.description: Dashboard KPI card. Icon container with accent color, large metric value, descriptive label, optional trend indicator.
components.html:
1,284
Usuarios Activos
+12% vs ayer
components.css: .ds-stat-card { background: #FFFFFF; border-radius: 14px; padding: 20px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.06); min-width: 180px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-stat-icon { width: 52px; height: 52px; border-radius: 12px; background: rgba(198,40,40,0.09); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-stat-content { flex: 1; min-width: 0; } .ds-stat-value { font-size: 30px; font-weight: 700; color: #1a1a1a; line-height: 1.1; letter-spacing: -0.02em; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-stat-label { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: #6B6B6B; margin-top: 4px; } .ds-stat-trend { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; margin-top: 4px; } .ds-trend-up { color: #2E7D32; } .ds-trend-down { color: #C62828; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard form control. Minimal border at rest, red focus ring on activation.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 10px 14px; border: 1.5px solid #E8E4E0; border-radius: 8px; background: #FFFFFF; color: #1a1a1a; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; outline: none; transition: all 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #B0B0B0; } .ds-input:focus, .ds-input-focus { border-color: #C62828; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(198,40,40,0.10); }

components.name: Sidebar Navigation
components.description: Fixed left navigation rail. Dark navy gradient shell with red active state. The structural anchor of every authenticated screen.
components.html:
SCIENCEFIT
Admin Panel
Dashboard Usuarios Planes
components.css: .ds-sidebar { width: 240px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #1a1a2e 0%, #16213e 100%); display: flex; flex-direction: column; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; overflow: hidden; } .ds-sidebar-logo { padding: 24px 20px 20px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07); } .ds-logo-text { font-size: 22px; font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: 0.1em; color: #C62828; line-height: 1.1; } .ds-logo-sub { font-size: 11px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4); letter-spacing: 0.08em; margin-top: 3px; font-weight: 500; } .ds-sidebar-nav { flex: 1; padding-top: 12px; } .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 12px 20px; border-radius: 10px; margin: 2px 12px; color: #94a3b8; font-weight: 500; font-size: 14px; text-decoration: none; transition: all 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-nav-item:hover { color: #fff; transform: translateX(4px); background: rgba(198,40,40,0.15); } .ds-nav-active { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #C62828, #8B0000) !important; color: #fff !important; font-weight: 600; box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(198,40,40,0.30); transform: none !important; }

components.name: Data Table Row
components.description: Tabular data display. Cream header row with uppercase labels, data rows with hover tint, semantic row states.
components.html:
UsuarioPlanEstadoFecha
Francisco AliagaMAXActivoJun 15, 2026
Ana GarcíaFREEPendienteJun 14, 2026
components.css: .ds-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; background: #FFFFFF; border-radius: 14px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-table th { text-align: left; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; color: #6B6B6B; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; padding: 12px 16px; border-bottom: 2px solid #E8E4E0; background: #FAFAF8; } .ds-table td { padding: 14px 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid #E8E4E0; color: #1a1a1a; font-size: 14px; transition: background 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-table tr:last-child td { border-bottom: none; } .ds-table tr:hover td { background: rgba(250,250,248,0.8); } .ds-table .ds-row-warning td { background: #FFF8E1; } .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.03em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-badge-max { background: #FFEBEE; color: #C62828; } .ds-badge-free { background: #F3F4F6; color: #555555; } .ds-badge-active { background: #E8F5E9; color: #2E7D32; } .ds-badge-pending { background: #FFF8E1; color: #F57F17; }

narrative.overview:
ScienceFit Admin is not a dashboard — it is an instrument. Like a Garmin sports watch or a Whoop band, it exists to give precision-hungry users direct, unmediated access to performance data. The aesthetic vocabulary comes from this analogy: a dark, authoritative navigation rail (the device casing), bright cream content surfaces (the display face), and a single red accent that functions like a status indicator light — used only where it earns its presence.

The surface is built for density without noise. Admins and coaches are in operational mode: they need to see user counts, subscription states, and workout logs at a glance — not wade through chrome or illustration. The system communicates confidence through exact spacing, sharp typographic contrast, and restraint. Nothing decorates for decoration's sake. Every visual decision can be traced to a functional reason.

This system explicitly rejects the casual warmth of consumer fitness apps (MyFitnessPal's pastel greens, gamified celebration states), the sterile coldness of clinical UI (all-white backgrounds, form-heavy layouts without hierarchy), and the forgettable genericness of standard SaaS dashboards that look identical from one product to the next. ScienceFit's interface should feel like a tool built for athletes — not a wellness app built for everyone.
keyCharacteristics: Dark navy sidebar as structural anchor; cream page canvas as neutral content surface
Single red accent, used for primary actions, active navigation state, and critical status only
Inter at extreme weights (700, 900) for data values; Inter 400/500 for reading copy
Gently rounded corners (14px cards, 8px controls) — tactile but not playful
Shadows as ambient depth signals, not decorative texture
Skeleton loading states, not spinners; each animation serves a state transition

rules.name: The One Signal Rule
rules.body: #C62828 marks exactly one thing at a time: the currently active nav item, the primary CTA, or a status indicator. If more than one element on a screen is red, one of them is wrong.

rules.name: The Navy Shell Rule
rules.body: The dark navy (#1a1a2e) exists only in the sidebar. Never apply it to content cards, page backgrounds, or modals. Its darkness is the contrast that makes the content surface legible.

rules.name: The Weight-as-Hierarchy Rule
rules.body: Do not use font size alone to establish hierarchy. In this system, a 14px/700 stat label outranks a 16px/400 body paragraph. Weight communicates authority; size communicates scope.

rules.name: The One Uppercase Register
rules.body: Tracked uppercase (≥0.04em) appears only on table <th> elements, badge text, and the product logotype. Not on page headings, section titles, card headers, or button labels.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Shadows appear as a response to state (hover, elevation, modal), not as decoration on static content. A card at rest may use Ambient Low or no shadow at all. Never apply Ambient High to a resting, non-modal surface.

dos: Do use #C62828 for exactly one prominent element per screen — the active nav item, the primary CTA, or a status indicator. Its impact depends on scarcity.
Do use Inter weight 700 or 900 for numeric data values and key metrics. Weight communicates authority; the number should land.
Do use the sidebar's dark navy (#1a1a2e) only for the navigation rail. Content backgrounds stay on the cream/white two-tone system.
Do animate state transitions with cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1) at 0.15s–0.3s. Transitions confirm interactions; they are not choreography.
Do use skeleton loading states (shimmer animation over warm grey) for deferred data.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion — wrap fadeInUp, slideUp, and count-up animations in a media query check.
Do keep badge text uppercase at 11px with at least +0.03em tracking.
Do differentiate the Chalk Cream canvas (#FAFAF8) from the Analytical White card surface (#FFFFFF) — this tonal separation is how cards lift from the page without shadows.
donts: Don't use casual pastel greens, gamified celebration animations, or streak-style progress indicators. The aesthetic of MyFitnessPal is the anti-reference by name.
Don't apply #1a1a2e navy to content cards, page backgrounds, or modals. Dark surfaces are the sidebar's domain.
Don't use the standard SaaS dashboard pattern without craft: identical card grids, the same sidebar+topbar+table layout copied from a UI kit with no character.
Don't use clinical/hospital UI conventions: all-white everything, form-heavy layouts with zero spatial personality, cold sans-serif type with no weight differentiation.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text) on any surface. Gradient fills belong on buttons and the sidebar; text must stay solid.
Don't use glassmorphism as a default card treatment. backdrop-filter: blur exists on the modal overlay only.
Don't apply large colored side-stripe borders (border-left: 4px solid #C62828) to cards as a decorative pattern.
Don't uppercase every section heading. Uppercase tracked labels belong on table <th> elements and badges only.
Don't use heavy color or full-saturation accents on inactive or rest states. #C62828 at full opacity on a resting, non-interactive element is visual noise.
